text.title: Supabase MVP Stack Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: rls_enabled false; policies empty (minItems=1); bucket marked public; migrations_path empty; Realtime channel not reviewed; owner plural.

list.pattern: any table with RLS off in production.
policies with `TO public USING (true)` or unscoped role.
schema changes done via dashboard without a corresponding migration.
storage bucket public-by-default; sensitive files leak.
